title: Rich Smoky Irish Kidney Beans Stew
description: A hearty, plant-based Irish stew bursting with smoky paprika and fluffy kidney beans, perfect for a festive dinner.
instructions: Rinse the kidney beans and soak them overnight, then drain.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until translucent.
Stir in the smoked paprika and ground cumin, cooking for 30 seconds to bloom the spices.
Add the soaked beans, bay leaf, diced tomatoes, tomato paste, vegetable broth, salt, and pepper, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer uncovered for 90 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Remove the bay leaf and taste, adjusting seasoning if needed.
Serve the stew hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the stew rest for 5 minutes before serving.
